allow: Bash(node -e "const Database = require\(''better-sqlite3''\); const db = new Database\(''./dev.db''\); const low = db.prepare\(""SELECT c.id, c.name, c.fitScore, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM Contact WHERE companyId = c.id\) as cnt FROM Company c WHERE c.fitScore >= 80 AND \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM Contact WHERE companyId = c.id\) < 2 ORDER BY c.fitScore DESC""\).all\(\); console.log\(''Top companies with < 2 contacts:'', low.length\); low.forEach\(r => console.log\(''  '', r.name, ''\(score:'', r.fitScore + ''\) -'', r.cnt, ''contacts''\)\);")
